summary: Completed testing of Blomm-Daya Phase 1 features: Wishlist, AI-generated Greeting Cards, and Photo Reviews. This is a React Native/Expo app with Convex backend. Backend API tests passed. Code review completed with fixes applied for critical issues.

minor.issue: Schema correctly defines wishlist table with proper indexes - functioning as expected
Uses template-based greeting generation (not AI) - templates are comprehensive for 8 occasions in 3 languages

code_fixes_applied.issue: Syntax error - duplicate closing brace on line 170-171
TypeScript error - floristName passed to addItem but not in CartItem type
code_fixes_applied.fix: Removed floristName from addItem call as it's not part of CartItem interface

code_fixes_applied.issue: Duplicate 'presets' property in photoEditor object causing TS1117 error
code_fixes_applied.fix: Restructured to have presets.title instead of duplicate keys

action_items: PhotoReviewsScreen uses MOCK data - backend functions for fetching/submitting photo reviews need to be implemented (photoReviews.ts Convex functions)
Existing TypeScript errors in convex/*.ts files (pre-existing issues not related to Phase 1 features) - recommend fixing for code quality
critical_code_review_comments: WishlistScreen: Good implementation with proper data-testid attributes, theme support, and i18n
GreetingCardScreen: Well-structured with tabs for generate/history, occasion selection grid, and edit capability
BrowseScreen: Heart button on product cards correctly integrated with toggleWishlist mutation
BuyerSettingsScreen: Navigation to Wishlist and GreetingCards properly configured
App.tsx: Stack navigation for Wishlist and GreetingCards screens correctly set up
Convex schema: wishlist and greetingCards tables properly defined with indexes
Translation files: All new keys for wishlist, greetingCards, and photoReviews properly added in en.ts, uk.ts, sv.ts
PhotoReviewsComponent: UI complete but backend integration is MOCKED - shows empty state by default

success_rate.frontend: Code review only - React Native app requires device/simulator testing

test_credentials: N/A - uses buyerDeviceId for anonymous user identification
seed_data_creation: N/A - Convex backend already deployed with existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: This is a React Native Expo app with Convex backend (https://glad-bison-596.convex.cloud). The FastAPI backend (/app/backend/server.py) handles only AI chat functionality. All other features use Convex directly. PhotoReviewsScreen is MOCKED - needs backend implementation. The app runs via Expo tunnel. Use mobile device testing for full UI verification.

mocked_apis.PhotoReviewsScreen: Uses mock data - fetches empty array, submit simulates success with setTimeout. Backend functions for photoReviews table exist in schema but not fully implemented

greetingCards.backend: convex/greetingCards.ts - generateGreeting (uses templates, not AI), getOccasions, getMyGreetingCards

photoReviews.backend: Schema exists but functions use simulated data
